name: Apple Cake with Icing
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Mix all cake ingredients together in a large bowl until well combined.
3. Pour the batter into a greased 9 x 13-inch oblong pan.
4. Bake for 45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean.
5. Remove from oven and let cool slightly.
6. For the icing, melt margarine in a small saucepan over low heat.
7. Add brown sugar and milk, stirring constantly until well blended.
8. Pour the warm icing mixture over the warm cake and spread evenly with a spatula.
9. Allow the cake to cool completely before serving.
